name: vercel
description: Official Vercel CLI. Deploy projects, manage domains, environment variables, and logs with OAuth browser login.
author: Vercel

args_schema.name: action
args_schema.description: Action to perform: 'login' for OAuth browser authentication, 'run' to execute a vercel command.

args_schema.name: input
args_schema.description: The vercel sub-command to run (only required if action is 'run').
